title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced reaches 2 million sales and sparks controversy over its DLC
summary: The remake of the pirate game surpassed two million units on its launch day, while Ubisoft responds to criticism about downloadable content and celebrates with a gift for players.

title: Soulframe opens for free for a limited time and announces the Warsong update with a dark branch
summary: The action RPG from the creators of Warframe allows everyone to play for free for a limited time, includes wolf mounts and a new 'edgelord' progression path in the Warsong update.

title: Obsidian's director responds to criticism and defends the studio's trajectory after layoffs
summary: After criticism about the state of the studio, Obsidian's director assures that the development line from KotOR2 to their current games is clear and that they have not lost their creative essence.

title: Warframe reveals Tau, its long-awaited second solar system, with a detective story
summary: Digital Extremes presents the new planetary system Tau for Warframe, which will arrive later this year with a setting that combines Blade Runner, The Sopranos, and film noir.

title: EA reverses microtransactions in College Football 27 after player backlash
summary: The company removed the in-game purchases after a fan revolt, although it defended that the intention was to offer more options.

title: The creators of DOOM break their silence and claim they retain the necessary team to continue making games
summary: id Software insists that it still has the key personnel to develop the technology and games for which they are known, despite the massive layoffs in the industry.

title: The EU admits it cannot prevent Sony from eliminating physical discs, while a former PlayStation executive shows his nostalgia
summary: The European Commission declares that companies are free to offer their services as they see fit, while the former president of PlayStation feels sad as a fan about the abandonment of the physical format.

title: Pokémon Winds and Waves leaks point to a record Pokédex that could be unplayable
summary: The alleged leaks of the upcoming Pokémon games suggest they would include the largest number of Pokémon in history, which could affect the game's balance.

title: The creators of Cyberpunk Edgerunners 2 explain why David Martínez will not return
summary: Those responsible for the continuation of the animated series confirm that the protagonist of the first season will not return, leaving the door open to new characters.

title: Palworld's 1.0 update modifies several designs to make them look less like Pokémon
summary: The successful open-world game adjusts the appearance of some creatures after criticism over similarities with the Nintendo franchise.

title: The next Star Citizen update will focus on fixing bugs and postponing major changes
summary: The development of the space simulator prioritizes stability after a problematic update, relegating big additions to later patches.

title: Mortal Shell 2 announced amid the saturation of releases prior to GTA 6
summary: The sequel to the acclaimed soulslike plans its launch despite the tight schedule of big releases, trusting in its quality to stand out.

title: After 22 years, a GTA mod considered lost is rebuilt from scratch
summary: A developer managed to restore a piece of Grand Theft Auto modding history that was thought lost forever.

title: Steam generates an estimated $11.1 billion in revenue in the first six months of the year
summary: According to a market analyst, Valve's platform records its best first half in history, surpassing $10 billion.

title: Ubisoft officially confirms that there are three new Assassin's Creed games in development
summary: The company announces that the action-stealth franchise will continue to expand with several installments in different stages of production.

title: Microsoft responds to racist conspiracy theories about its layoffs: they were not to replace employees with foreign workers
summary: The company issues a statement denying claims that link job cuts to hiring foreign labor.

title: Meta removes its latest AI integration on Instagram after pressure from the actors' union
summary: The company removes the artificial intelligence feature after complaints from SAG-AFTRA over the unauthorized use of actors' voices.

title: Shironeko Project INFINITY announced for Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch
summary: The popular Japanese mobile game will come to Nintendo consoles with a new installment titled INFINITY.

title: A player wins lawsuit against Microsoft to recover his hacked Xbox account
summary: After being told he had to repurchase all his digital games, the user took the case to court and managed to regain access to his account.

title: Saber Interactive receives a flood of major licensing offers after the success of Space Marine 2
summary: The studio states that the game's success 'changed everything' and that it is now in a privileged position to select projects and reject most proposals.
